title: Error (200) Make.com - Create a phone number
excerpt:
Having trouble making a new item because of phone number formatting issues? 
Here is how the workflow is setup. I have it formated as ### ### #### then make.com creates a +1 for the column. I’m confused here

posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having trouble making a new item because of phone number formatting issues?
Here is how the workflow is setup. I have it formated as ### ### #### then make.com creates a +1 for the column. I’m confused here

mke.com 31921×1021 207 KB

image1921×1021 138 KB

mke.com 21921×1021 176 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: ISO-2 country code is a two LETTER code. In this case would be US for USA. I suggest using the make phone number module to validate and format phone numbers before using in the make module.

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: You need to use “Phone number” module in make apps and parse it on country basis then it would be good to go.
